descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Pembroke Lumber Kings 9-3 in Centennial Cup semifinal to advance to championship final.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes advanced to the Centennial Cup junior-A championship final by defeating the Pembroke Lumber Kings 9-3 in a semifinal game in Humboldt, Saskatchewan on Thursday night. Richmond's goals came from Trevor Dickie, Steve Dartmouth, Matt Hervey, Brian Kozak, Paul Rutherford, Jason Phillips, Tony Bobbitt, Bryon Moller, and Bill Hardy. The Sockeyes outshot Pembroke 44-32 and will face the Saskatchewan champion Humboldt Broncos in the sudden-death final Saturday night.
